# v2.0.15

## Changes

- Manual review runs now publish a merge-request-level GitLabWorkRunner summary with status, commit, result count, review scope, batch/tool usage, elapsed time, preferences, and failed items.
- Rename-file inline comments now use the GitLab diff `old_path` and `new_path` when creating line-level discussions.
- Comment records now store the actual publish position: `inline`, `merge_request`, or `merge_request_fallback`.
- When GitLab rejects an inline discussion and the runner falls back to a merge-request-level comment, stored comment records no longer keep misleading `path` and `new_line` values.
- Dashboard schema validation now checks `review_comment_records.publish_position` so old databases report an actionable migration error before comments are queried.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.15-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.15-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
